description: Leading the team building software and hardware for decentralized telecom infrastructure. Integral in launching the Helium Mobile MVNO — negotiated the original T-Mobile contract, planned and led the build of MVNO backend systems, and led integration with the T-Mobile wholesale telco core.
highlights: Built Wi-Fi offload network from 0 to 3.5M+ daily users in 18 months
Led MVNO backend build: customer management, SIM/eSIM provisioning, inventory, fraud detection, cost optimization, regulatory compliance
Leading WBA project to reshape carrier offload with tier-1 US carriers
Building Claude-friendly MCP interfaces for AI-driven network analysis
5 new patent applications filed on blockchain-telecom convergence

description: Co-founded the company that brought CBRS small cells to the Helium network via open-source private cellular infrastructure. Acquired by Nova Labs in 2022.
highlights: Built the company from concept to acquisition
Developed open-source CBRS small cell platform
Bridged traditional telecom with blockchain-based incentive models
Led technical strategy and product development

description: Published researcher and standards body leader. Drove innovation in vRAN, CoMP, LTE/WiFi coexistence, and DOCSIS network optimization. Led standardization work across 3GPP, WFA, WBA, TIP, O-RAN, and DOCSIS/SCTE.
highlights: Published research on vRAN, CoMP over DOCSIS, CoDel AQM, WiFi coexistence
Active contributor and leadership roles in WBA, WFA, TIP, O-RAN Alliance

description: Built an all-IP linear video + VOD cable TV-like service provider. Led set-top box HW/SW development — chip selection with Broadcom, ODM negotiation, integration, and deployment. Full video headend from satellite feeds through encoding, ABR packaging, and Wi-Fi-based IP set-top boxes with QoS.
highlights: Led set-top box development from chip selection to deployment
Built full video headend: satellite feeds → encoding → ABR packaging → delivery
Designed Wi-Fi-based IP set-top boxes with QoS for reliable in-home delivery

description: Master of Science in Electrical Engineering. Focus on electromagnetic fields, digital signal processing, wireless LANs, wavelet theory, and blind signal processing. Thesis: 'User Based Quality of Service for 802.11 Networks.'
